name: Crock Pot Teriyaki Chicken
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Pineapple Chunks in Light Syrup, partially drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken breasts into the crock pot.
2. Add the pineapple and teriyaki sauce to the crock pot.
3. Cover the crock pot.
4. Cook on low for 6-8 hours or cook on high for 4-6 hours.
5. Serve over rice.
